properties.avoid: This tryptamine may work differently than other tryptamines. Caution is recommended for all mixes with it.
properties.note: It seems that everyone is in favour of taking this substance intranasally, due to a quite poor oral BA.
properties.summary: Research chemical of tryptamine class. First noted being sold in 2012. There are conflicting reports on it's effects. The drug does not dissolve well in all solutions it was tested.
